title: Bosch Professional PointTeQ HSS Twist Drill Bit (for Metal, 6 x 57 x 93 mm, Accessories for Drill Driver)
features: Saves time: The HSS Twist Drill Bit PointTeQ enables you to drill through metal quickly thanks to the special design of the drill bit tip
High durability: The increased speed of the drill bit means less heat is built up, reducing wear
Precision work: The self-centering PointTeq tip design prevents slipping and allows an easy and efficient start
Areas of use: For making holes through alloyed and mild steel, non-ferrous metals, cast steel, cast iron and plastic
Compatibility: Suitable for all drill drivers, bench drills and rotary combi drills
description: Extremely fast and precise for drilling metal Fast, yet precise - these are the characteristics that the PointTeQ HSS twist drill bit has to offer. The self-centring drill bit tip prevents slipping, making quick and precise tapping possible. The increased speed of the drill bit means less heat is built up, reducing wear. The cutting edge on the drill bit stays sharp and withstands continuous use. Particularly suited to working with alloyed and mild steel, non-ferrous metals, cast steel, cast iron and plastic. A coolant such as oil is recommended when cutting or processing metal. This helps prolong the service life of the drill bit and produces better results on the workpiece. The round shank of the HSS twist drill bit means that it can be used universally in drill drivers, bench drills and rotary combi drills. Scope of delivery: 1 x Bosch Professional PointTeQ HSS Twist Drill Bit with round shank – Ø: 6 mm, working length: 57 mm, total length: 93 mm
